title: [IOS]App Settings - General - Account - Log in - Log out - Continue
scenario: Account login/logout flow in Poly Studio Mobile App Settings > General > Account
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app as a guest user.
2. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
4. Tap 'Continue' and log in with valid credentials.
5. Verify the 'Your account' section displays with Name and Email fields populated.
7. Verify a login dialog opens with 'Cancel' and 'Continue' options.
9. Verify the user is logged out.
10. Verify the 'Your account' section shows 'You aren't currently logged in' and the 'Log in' button is visible.
expected: After logging in, 'Your account' section displays with Name and Email fields populated. After logging out, 'Your account' section shows 'You aren't currently logged in' and the 'Log in' button is visible.
